creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
File in pkg-plist doesn't exist, per 

===>  Building package for freeradius3-3.0.1_1
tar: share/examples/freeradius/raddb/mods-config/perl/example.pl: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** [do-package] Error code 1

Fix: 

rm this entry 
%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/raddb/mods-config/perl/example.pl
from pkg-plist
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/freeradius3 && make -DBATCH __MAKE_CONF=/dev/null package
